basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Postdoctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Civil/Energy/Chemical/Mechanical/Biotechnology or any other relevant department
qualification.details: Postdoctoral Fellow: PhD in Civil/Energy/Chemical/Mechanical/Biotechnology or any other relevant department from a recognized university/institute, with experience in Biomass Pretreatment and/or thermochemical conversion (gasification, hydrothermal liquefaction, pyrolysis), Life Cycle assessment. Candidates who have submitted their thesis may also apply. Applicants must have secured a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent grade) from the undergraduate level onwards, and at least 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in both Class 10 and 12.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_gandhinag: PhD in Civil/Energy/Chemical/Mechanical/Biotechnology or any other relevant department

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postdoctoral Fellow: PhD in Civil/Energy/Chemical/Mechanical/Biotechnology or any other relevant department from a recognized university/institute, with experience in Biomass Pretreatment and/or thermochemical conversion (gasification, hydrothermal liquefaction, pyrolysis), Life Cycle assessment. Candidates who have submitted their thesis may also apply. Applicants must have secured a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent grade) from the undergraduate level onwards, and at least 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in both Class 10 and 12.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 19 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Postdoctoral Fellow post in the IIT Gandhinagar recruitment drive. This offers a specific opportunity for eligible candidates in the relevant fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Postdoctoral Fellow positions at IIT Gandhinagar is online. Interested and eligible candidates must submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The salary for the Postdoctoral Fellow position ranges from Rs. 72,000 to Rs. 84,000 per month. This competitive salary package is offered to selected candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the Postdoctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a PhD in Civil/Energy/Chemical/Mechanical/Biotechnology or any other relevant department from a recognized university/institute. Specific experience and academic marks criteria also apply.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for IIT Gandhinagar Postdoctoral Fellow Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Postdoctoral Fellow recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar includes an Application Review followed by Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is crucial to read the notification thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The official website for Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar is https://www.iitgn.ac.in. You can find more details and apply through this portal.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Postdoctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Postdoctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is a Contractual job type. This means the employment will be for a specific period as outlined in the official notification.
